title: Loop Check and Pre-Commissioning
description: Comprehensive loop check and pre-commissioning services for electrical and instrumentation systems in Hong Kong.
overview: DES provides thorough loop check and pre-commissioning services to ensure your electrical and instrumentation systems are ready for operation. We verify all connections, calibrations, and functionality before energization.
scope: Loop testing of power and control circuits
process: Record results and track punch items
